query:
SELECT w.id as worker_id, w.code as worker_code, w.full_name, w.group_id, 
  COALESCE(g.code, 'N/A') as group_code, 
  COALESCE(g.name, 'N/A') as group_name, 
  COALESCE(g.daily_wage, 0) as daily_wage, 
  COALESCE(g.work_minutes, 0) as work_minutes
FROM workers w
LEFT JOIN `groups` g ON g.id = w.group_id
WHERE w.id = 180104;
